title: Cockroach Janta Party: Delhi High Court declines to order immediate restoration of X account
description: The Delhi High Court on Friday issued notice to the Union government and X on a petition moved by Cockroach Janta Party (CJP) founder Abhijeet Dipke challenging the blocking of the CJP's X account. However, Justice Purushaindra Kumar Kaurav declined to immediately order restoration of the account. The Court said it can grant such relief only after hearing the government since the issue has far reaching consequences.
